text: The first part of the verse means literally, ‘I will spread out over Jerusalem the line of Samaria, and the plummet of the house of Achab’. In the second half, the Latin version probably intends an allusion to the Roman custom of using the blunt end of the pen to erase the characters on a wax tablet. The Hebrew text is commonly interpreted as meaning that God will scrape Jerusalem clean, and turn it upside down, like an unused vessel.
